claim: PCF-2 v1.3 R1.1+R1.3+Q1 cubic+quartic harvest scripts implement the canonical (1,b) backward-recurrence CF, hardcoding partial numerators a_n ≡ 1 identically (i.e., deg_a = 0 for the implemented stratum).

PCF-2 v1.3 program statement (tex/submitted/pcf2_program_statement.tex line 230) declares the program scope as a_n = δ_1 n + δ_0 (linear in n, deg_a ≤ 1), distinct from the harvest-script-implemented stratum a_n ≡ 1 (deg_a = 0).

Under the harvest-script-implemented stratum (deg_a = 0, c_a = 1), the WZ normal-case Newton-polygon balance analysis yields balance (I) μ_dom = d, γ_dom = c_b and balance (III) μ_sub = -d, γ_sub = -1/c_b (c_a = 1, c_b is leading coefficient of b_n).
Under the harvest-script-implemented stratum (deg_a = 0), A_naive = μ_dom - μ_sub = d - (-d) = 2d.
PCF-2 v1.3 R1.1 cubic empirical record (50/50 cubic representatives at d=3) reports A_fit mean = 5.978 with σ = 0.026, consistent with WZ normal-case prediction A_naive = 2d = 6 within σ.
PCF-2 v1.3 Q1 quartic empirical record (60/60 quartic representatives at d=4) reports A_fit mean = 7.954 with σ = 0.0037, consistent with WZ normal-case prediction A_naive = 2d = 8 within σ.

PCF-1 v1.3 (tex/submitted/p12_journal_main.tex L128-136) defines the d=2 standard stratum with a_n = δ n + ε (linear, deg_a = 1, with α and δ explicitly nonzero), distinct from PCF-2 v1.3 cubic-harvest's deg_a = 0.

bt_baseline_note v1.0 (Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.20048197, PDF SHA-256 23022f0d..f0e5b7c) Theorem 1.1 covers the band deg_a ∈ {d-1, d, d+1} (three SIARC α/symmetric/δ-direction conventions); deg_a = 0 (the (1,b) convention used by PCF-2 R1.1/R1.3/Q1 cubic+quartic harvest scripts) is not covered by Theorem 1.1's stated band.

Q1 synthesizer-substitute verdict: PROTOCOL_TO_STRATUM_MISMATCH_FIRST_PIVOT (scoped to PCF-2 R1.1/R1.3/Q1); mechanism (i') likely unnecessary for harvested scripts under correct stratum identification; mechanism (ii') remains separately audit-worthy as an operational-definition question.

Q2 synthesizer-substitute verdict: GATED_BY_Q1_PIVOT; under Q1 = PROTOCOL_TO_STRATUM_MISMATCH_FIRST_PIVOT, mechanism (i') is not realised on the harvest-script PCF-2 R1.1/R1.3/Q1 stratum; provisional fallback B = √(c_a) is retained as expected ansatz analogue if Q1's mismatch finding is rejected.

Q4 synthesizer-substitute verdict: WASOW_CANONICAL_TARGET_WITH_COSTIN_OPERATIONAL_SUBSTITUTE; Wasow §X.3 Theorem 11.1 is the canonical sectorial-upgrade target (currently OCR-unavailable on disk); Costin 2008 ch.5 (Borel-Laplace radius) is the accessible-on-disk operational substitute providing equivalent analytic-side guarantee for Gevrey-1 formal series.

This synthesizer-substitute verdict is operator-authorized cross-tier (T2 acting in T1-Synth capacity) for one round only; canonical T1-Synthesizer (Claude.ai weekly-cadence) re-arbitration is explicitly recommended at next ISO week W20 (Mon 2026-05-11) before any repo-wide wording or scope-statement changes derived from this verdict.
